assertions.title: Shared Create Profile renders content parity

steps.expected: Shared Create Profile content matches contract copy and structure
steps.observed: Observed expected top bar, shared stepper labels/states, form sections (Profile Name, Assigned Local Share, Profile Password, Relays, Peer Permissions), and CTA text.

assertions.title: Shared Create Profile uses "shared" Stepper variant

steps.expected: Stepper labels are 'Create / Rotate', 'Create Profile', 'Distribute Shares' with step 1 completed check disk and step 2 active
steps.observed: Stepper uses shared labels; step 1 is completed with check disk and step 2 is active.

assertions.title: Shared Create Profile — password confirmation green check

steps.observed: DOM shell class for confirm field is `password-shell checked` and matched-state screenshot captured.

steps.action: Change Confirm Password to mismatched value
steps.expected: Checked state removed and neutral state restored
steps.observed: After entering mismatch, DOM shell class becomes `password-shell` (no checked state), and neutral-state screenshot captured.

assertions.title: Shared Create Profile — relay add/remove works

steps.action: Enter wss://relay.damus.io in relay add input and click Add
steps.expected: New relay chip appears with remove control
steps.observed: New removable relay chip appears; snapshot shows button `Remove wss://relay.damus.io`.
Relay chip disappears; subsequent snapshot no longer shows remove control for damus relay.

assertions.title: Shared Create Profile Continue advances to Distribute Shares

steps.expected: Navigate to /create/distribute with steps 1-2 completed and step 3 active
steps.observed: Navigated to /create instead of /create/distribute; expected distribute stepper state not reached.

assertions.issues: CTA route behavior does not match contract: expected /create/distribute, observed /create.

frictions.description: URL wait for expected /create/distribute timed out because CTA navigated to /create.
frictions.resolution: Captured observed URL and before/after screenshots, then marked assertion as fail.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 4 passed, 1 failed (VAL-SHR-005 route mismatch to /create).
